title: The Mimic-Bird (Eddy's Familiar)
bodyText:
A strange **mimicking bird from the Feywild** — a round, fluffy owl-like puff of watercolor plumage (blue crown fading through orange to coral, huge mismatched glossy eyes, two curly antenna-feathers). Joined the party in **S25**: they heard its mimicry echoing in the caves — *calls for help, hellos, cat meows, cow moos* — then it saw [[pc-eddy|Eddy]] and **ran straight to him**.

> [!dm] It **recognized** him: it is **Silus's familiar** — Silus was a **sorcerer**, and Wes gave him the ability to have a familiar. When Silus fell into the pool it lost him, and it has spent **years — a couple, a few — wandering the depths searching**. It found him: his soul, buried inside Eddy ([[pc-eddy]]). **Only Jake knows; the other players don't.**
>
> **Payout = trickle reveal (Wes, 2026-07-21).** No lore dump — small wrong-right moments: it responds to things only Silus would, mimics a voice nobody at the table has heard, prefers Eddy in ways a stray wouldn't.
>
> ⚑ Open: exactly HOW Silus fell into the pool — Wes: "we can cover that later." The living tease for the **Eddy-or-Silus** choice. Use its mimicry + recognition to surface "Silus stuff" and pull Jake toward the climactic choice at [[the-pool|the Pool]]. Possible link to **Gwen** (Silus's partner, [[ideas-parking-lot]]). If Jake chooses to stay Eddy, the bird is a candidate vessel/anchor for what happens to Silus's soul.
